name: create_embeddings
description: Generate vector embeddings for one or more input texts. Returns high-dimensional float vectors useful for semantic search, document clustering, classification, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The embedding model ID to use (e.g. 'togethercomputer/m2-bert-80M-8k-retrieval').

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Input text or array of texts to generate embeddings for.
parameters.example: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

body.input: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
